text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 278 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_LTCP_G_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy - days in other day supply of generic drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of the generic drugs (other than 
1-month) on this tier, when using a long term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage 
limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT
